primary_use: Personalis-like 30x WGS and somatic SNV/indel/SV/CNV truth
raw_data: HG008-T and HG008-N-D Illumina WGS FASTQs from GIAB FTP
truth_or_expected_answer: NIST HG008-T small-variant v0.3 benchmark plus SV/CNV v0.5 benchmark
first_pipeline_gate: Downsample WGS to 30x, call SNV/indel/SV/CNV, compare against NIST truth BED/VCF
notes: Best first validation target because truth files and raw data are public and current.

primary_use: Altera-like WTS ingestion and RNA QC
raw_data: HG008-T UMD RNA-seq FASTQs from GIAB FTP
truth_or_expected_answer: No full RNA truth selected yet; use paired FASTQ validation and stable alignment/quantification QC first
first_pipeline_gate: Run RNA FASTQ validation and quantification; later add fusion/known transcript checks
notes: Same cancer reference family as HG008 WGS, useful for WTS plumbing.

primary_use: Independent WGS truth set and HRD-negative/UV-signature guardrail
raw_data: ENA PRJEB27698 Illumina WGS runs ERR2752449 normal and ERR2752450 tumor
truth_or_expected_answer: COLO829 SV/CNA truth from Zenodo; SNV catalogue/reference standard; expected BRAF V600 and UV-like signature
first_pipeline_gate: Run tumor-normal WGS, compare SV/CNV, assert driver/signature sanity checks
notes: Use purity series ERR4093255-ERR4093259 for dilution sensitivity after baseline.

primary_use: MRD-like dilution sensitivity without actual plasma
raw_data: ENA PRJEB27698 Illumina purity series ERR4093255 through ERR4093259
truth_or_expected_answer: Detection and truth overlap should degrade monotonically as tumor purity drops
first_pipeline_gate: Run selected purity levels against the same COLO829 truth and report recall by purity
notes: Not cfDNA, but valuable for tumor fraction stress testing.

primary_use: Signatera/NeXT Personal-like MRD positive-negative and dilution validation
raw_data: Seraseq ctDNA MRD Panel Mix sequence/variant files available upon request from LGC/SeraCare
truth_or_expected_answer: 0 percent tumor negative; 0.5 percent and 0.05 percent tumor positive; expected variants and VAFs in datasheet
first_pipeline_gate: Create MRD manifest once variant files are obtained; validate positive/negative classification and expected VAFs
notes: Best true MRD reference, but not a free public FASTQ download.
